name: aggregate_issues
description: Aggregate validation issues from all agents and generate a severity-weighted recommendation

agent_1_result.description: Result from Agent 1 (completeness check), must contain 'issues' list and 'valid' boolean

agent_2_result.description: Result from Agent 2 (quality check), must contain 'issues' list and 'valid' boolean

human_review_result.description: Result from human review, must contain 'issues' list and 'valid' boolean
